description_long: This object is a complex, industrial-style faucet assembly constructed primarily from metal pipes and fittings, with several protruding spouts and valves. The structure features three main horizontal pipe extensions, each fitted with a valve or nozzle, and is reinforced with visible fasteners and connectors. Some of the pipes are wrapped or covered with yellowish insulation material, and there are green wires or ties securing parts of the assembly. The metal surfaces show signs of wear and oxidation, giving the object a utilitarian, weathered appearance. Tags or labels are attached to some of the valves, suggesting it is used for controlling multiple water or gas lines. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for outdoor or industrial urban environments such as alleys, garages, or maintenance areas.
description: A rugged, multi-valve industrial faucet assembly with metal pipes, yellow insulation, and attached tags, designed for urban or utility settings.
description_view_0: A narrow side profile showing the thinness of the assembly and the protruding pipes extending outward.
description_view_1: A front view revealing the full arrangement of pipes, valves, and insulation, with all three main spouts visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile, highlighting the open ends of the pipes and the layered structure of the assembly.
description_view_3: A detailed view of the valves, connectors, and tags, showing the mechanical complexity and points of interaction.
